## Checklist
- [ ] Read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] Ran `uv run pre-commit run --all-files` locally (ruff + stylua + hygiene)
- [ ] Smoke-tested the TUI against `./migrations/` with a local SQLite database
- [ ] Ran `:checkhealth lazysqlx` in Neovim (only if the Lua plugin was touched)
- [ ] Added tests if necessary (significant changes/complex logic)
- [ ] Updated documentation if applicable
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if applicable
